title: lactuca corymbosa
intro: Lactuca corymbosa, also known as the prickly lettuce or California lettuce, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lactuca corymbosa include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among other uses. Herbal preparations of Lactuca corymbosa may include infusions, tinctures, and dried forms of the plant, which can be used to support overall well-being.
